content.query:
SELECT
    CAST(JSON_VALUE(jsonDoc, '$.payment_type') AS SMALLINT) payment_type,
    CAST(JSON_VALUE(jsonDoc, '$.payment_type_desc') AS VARCHAR(15)) payment_type_desc
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/payment_type.json',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FIELDTERMINATOR = '0x0b',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '1.0',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0a'
    )
WITH (
    jsonDoc NVARCHAR(MAX)
) AS payment_type;

-- Otro metodo (OpenJson)

SELECT
    payment_type,
    description
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/payment_type.json',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FIELDTERMINATOR = '0x0b',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b'
    )
WITH (
    jsonDoc NVARCHAR(MAX)
) AS payment_type
CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(jsonDoc)
WITH (
    payment_type SMALLINT,
    description VARCHAR(20) '$.payment_type_desc'
);

-- JSON with array

SELECT
    payment_type,
    sub_type,
    value
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/payment_type_array.json',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FIELDTERMINATOR = '0x0b',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b'
    )
WITH (
    jsonDoc NVARCHAR(MAX)
) AS payment_type
CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(jsonDoc)
WITH (
    payment_type SMALLINT,
    payment_type_desc NVARCHAR(MAX) AS JSON
)
CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(payment_type_desc)
WITH (
    sub_type SMALLINT,
    value VARCHAR(20)
)
